arts.ttl: Arsenal join race to sign Bundesliga wonderkid as transfer truth emerges
arts.sum: The Gunners were heavily linked with signing a new striker during the January transfer window before ultimately deciding against bringing in any reinforcements. Sky Germany are reporting that the Gunners are considering a move to sign the 20-year-old when the summer transfer window opens.

arts.ttl: Declan Rice makes Bukayo Saka Arsenal return claim as Ethan Nwaneri dressing room verdict given
arts.sum: Declan Rice was full of praise for Ethan Nwaneri as he continued his remarkable breakthrough, scoring during Arsenal's 7-1 victory over PSV Eindhoven in the Champions League. Speaking to Amazon Prime after the game, Rice described the 17-year-old's performance as 'top' before claiming he'd still be getting minutes in the side even if Bukayo Saka were fit.

arts.ttl: Thierry Henry reveals why he thinks Arsenal CAN go all the way in the Champions League after 7-1 thrashing of PSV
arts.sum: The Gunners blew their Dutch hosts out of the water on Tuesday night, registering the highest ever score in a single away leg by any team in Champions League history with their demolition job.

arts.ttl: Alexander Isak transfer update: Arsenal, Liverpool sent warning as battle for Newcastle United star intensifies
arts.sum: Newcastle United CEO Darren Eales speaks out on Alexander Isak's future amidst claims that Arsenal and Liverpool hold interest in the striker.

arts.ttl: Arsenal set UCL record but Arteta craves trophies
arts.sum: ﻿Mikel Arteta has suggested Arsenal want trophies and not records after they made Champions League history by thrashing PSV Eindhoven 7-1 at Philips Stadion.

arts.ttl: Record-breaking Arsenal enjoy carnival season in Eindhoven
arts.sum: Eindhoven is packed with carnival-goers but on Tuesday it was Arsenal enjoying their own party, setting a Champions League record in the process.

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney admits 'very difficult' feeling as Arsenal set Champions League record
arts.sum: Arsenal claimed a record-breaking 7-1 victory away to PSV Eindhoven in the Champions League round of 16 to put one foot into the quarter-finals of the competition

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta hails a 'special night' as Arsenal boss revels in the 'joy, confidence and belief' gained by thrashing PSV 7-1 away from home
arts.sum: ISAAN KHAN AT THE PHILIPS STADION: Arteta hailed a 'special night' for Arsenal as they obliterated PSV 7-1 on Tuesday to secure their biggest Champions League away win in history.

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney and Daniel Sturridge urge Thomas Tuchel to call-up Arsenal teenage star to his first England squad
arts.sum: Former Liverpool star Sturridge and Manchester United legend Wayne Rooney were full of praise for the youngster as they reflected on whether he would fit in Thomas Tuchel's England squad.

arts.ttl: Record-breaking Arsenal thrash PSV to allay attacking worries
arts.sum: Arsenal put their Premier League goal-scoring problems behind them by thrashing PSV Eindhoven 7-1 in the Champions League, and took a giant stride to the quarterfinals.
